productDisplayName: Lotto Men Laos Black Grey Floater
description: floaters are the coolest style of footwear you can ever own, and what can get even better than a stylish comfortable pair. Understanding your need for such fantabulous footwear, lotto has created the Laos to suit your style mantra in all glory. Team this with denims and tees for a cool, casual look.Upper Synthetic straps on the forefoot and ankles for comfort and protection Ankle strap with clasp Velcro strap enclosures on the forefoot for tightening Lightly padded straps for snug Fit Midsole Grooved footbed for added comfort Outsole Outsole with triangular lugs for great grip on wet surfaces Flex grooves below the forefoot and heel area for flexible movement of the feet shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
